children.heading: Report

children.text: Not later than , the Secretary shall submit a report to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions of the Senate and the Committee on Energy and Commerce of the House of Representatives regarding the outcomes of the programs and activities funded pursuant to , including any effective programs and activities identified.October 1, 2023section 300ii–1 of this title
